page.content: In the Contract Margin Analysis for Daiwa House Industry covering Fiscal Year 2024, Project A generated revenue of $5M, net income of $1M, and operating expenses of $2M, resulting in a gross profit of $2M and a margin of 20% over an average duration of 6 months. Project B, with a revenue of $8M, yielded a net income of $2M and operating expenses of $3M, leading to a gross profit of $3M and a margin of 25% over 12 months. Project C produced revenue of $12M, net income of $4M, and operating expenses of $5M, resulting in a gross profit of $5M and a margin of 33% over 18 months. Project D achieved revenue of $15M with a net income of $5M, operating expenses of $6M, yielding a gross profit of $6M and a margin of 33% over 24 months.

page.content: The total revenue across all projects reached $40M, net income totaled $12M, while operating expenses amounted to $16M, producing a gross profit of $16M with an overall margin of 30%, across 60 months of projects. CAPEX totaled $10M, with $8M allocated to Investment Projects and $2M to Renovation Projects. The Cash Flow Analysis reported a net cash flow of $5M, operating cash flow of $7M, and financing cash flow of -$2M. Profitability ratios indicated a return on investment of 15% and a return on equity of 20%. Future projections estimate a projected revenue of $50M and a projected net income of $15M.
